prompt: Create a dark gothic anime-fantasy portrait of a mysterious jester-headed swordsman walking forward in a candlelit Victorian theater hall. The character is a tall elegant male jester duelist centered full-body, wearing an ornate black tailcoat suit with gold embroidery, military-style frog closures, fitted trousers, white gloves, a pale cravat, layered waistcoat, chains, and a red-lined split tailcoat. His face is hidden by a smooth featureless square gray mask or blank censored face, while two enormous glossy horn-like jester appendages curve outward and upward from his head like long black hair or polished tentacles, each ending near a small dangling golden bell; use exactly 2 large curved head appendages and exactly 2 visible bells. He holds exactly 2 thin rapier-like swords, one in each hand, angled downward to the lower corners. The environment is a dim theatrical ballroom with deep burgundy curtains, tall arched windows, black candelabras, and a checkerboard floor. Include many floating playing cards swirling around him, with distinct visible cards in the foreground and background, plus candle clusters: one multi-candle candelabra on the left foreground, one multi-candle candelabra on the right foreground, and tall side candelabras glowing in the darkness. Lighting is moody, high-contrast, cinematic, with cool blue shadows, warm candle highlights, glossy reflections on the suit and horn appendages, shallow atmospheric haze, dramatic rim light, and fine ornate detailing. Style: high-detail dark anime illustration with semi-realistic fantasy rendering, vertical composition, symmetrical and theatrical, elegant menace, no readable text, no watermark.
